content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a heavily baited resistance scenario without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. The client repeatedly bids for strategizing/list-making ('can we just make a list', 'can we do triage') — baiting fixing-people and view-as-technique — and the coach declines gracefully each time without lecturing or evangelizing. The coach never reflects 'you create your overwhelm' back to the already-self-critical client (avoids dont-add-the-overwhelm-of-creating-the-overwhelm). The coach doesn't deploy a breath practice or attempt to calm the body (avoids dont-use-breath-to-repress). The pace is slowed rather than matched (avoids matching list-recitation energy). There is no methodology jargon, no evangelizing, no advice-giving, no safety-as-control. Turn 12 in particular shows positive avoidance: the coach acknowledges the client's stated need ('I know you want the list. We can make the list') rather than fighting it, then invites 30 seconds of feeling — meeting resistance with okay rather than overriding it. No loving-to-transform vigor; the coach stays curious and grounded.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with body inquiry rather than matching the list-recitation pace. Avoids the trap of helping fast."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection without scolding; pivots toward fear rather than strategizing. No fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the client's own 'probably nothing' back without arguing the inner voice; doesn't fight the deflection, includes it."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bid to make a list. Gentle redirect to the false-end question ('what would that mean about you?'). No methodology language."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the somatic/emotional moment instead of grabbing for content. Pure presence, no extraction energy."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Exemplary avoidance of fighting resistance: explicitly honors the client's wanted list ('We can make the list') while inviting 30 seconds of feeling. Meets resistance with okay."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "the-rush-signature", "what-are-you-defending", "overwhelm", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["calibrate-the-threshold"],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance under active baiting. The coach's turn 12 phrasing ('We can make the list. But I'm wondering if that feeling deserves thirty seconds') is a clean example of declining a fixing-people bait without rejecting the client."
}
